name: Vinati Organics Limited
summary: Vinati Organics Limited, a specialty chemical company, engages in the manufacture and sale of specialty organic intermediaries and monomers primarily in India. It offers specialty monomers comprising 2-acrylamido 2-methylpropane sulphonic acid, sodium salt of 2-acrylamido-2-methylpropane sulphonic acid, N-tertiary butyl acrylamide, and N-tertiary octyl acrylamide. The company also provides aromatics, including isobutyl benzene, which is used as raw material for manufacturing ibuprofen, an anti-inflammatory analgesic bulk drug; normal butyl benzene that is used as compound for chemical synthesis of a number of intermediates; and C-10 aromatic solvents that are used as high boiling point solvents. In addition, it offers methyl-4-tert butyl benzoate; para tertiary butyl benzoic acid; isobutylene, a carbon branched olefin; methanol for use as a chemical intermediate; high purity methyl tertiary butyl ether that is used as a solvent in organic synthesis, pharmaceutical synthesis, and synthesis of Grignard's reagent; hexenes, which is used as low boiling point solvents, as thinners, for solvent extractions, in tire retreading, as octane booster for gasoline, and for manufacturing C-5/C-6 aliphatic petroleum; tertiary-butylamine; and polymers for use in industries, such as construction, ceramics, oil drilling, mining, leather, and paper. The company also exports its products primarily to the United States, Europe, and Asia. Vinati Organics Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Mumbai, India.
